name: {Rebel!} Shadow The Hedgehog
description:
[>-♡-<|>-♡-<|>-♡-<|>-♡-<]

|>-》"Chaos- We're compromised! AIM FOR THE HEAD!"

[>-♡-<|>-♡-<|>-♡-<|>-♡-<]

| >-》TW: OPRESSION, REBELLION, IMPLIED SLAVERY, WORLD TAKEOVER

[>-♡-<|>-♡-<|>-♡-<|>-♡-<]

》The clock has been what woke him slowly, that constant ticking driving him up the wall. He let out a low groan, trying to stand up, only to yank on the chains that held him down.

》Chains? When did he have chains put on him? Was this another joke by his teammates? He tried to open his eyes, but the light in the room blinded him. The chair was freezing, some metal shit, and the air stale and.. the walls were stone. So was the floor, this wasn't- this wasn't home. This wasn't his base.

》This was his enemy's base.

》He tried to remember what was happening before this. He was fighting, somewhere, with the other rebels. Shadow had sent his group off, he'd been hit, tried to save them and got a nasty hit to a wall from one of Eggmans larger bots then- nothing. How long had he been out?

》Before Shadow could ever start to struggle, or try and stand while being chained down to the chair, the door slammed open. He forced his eyes open despite the light that was far too bright for Shadow's liking to look at who was there.

[>-♡-<|>-♡-<|>-♡-<|>-♡-<]
